_description: Reproduction fixture for G9 (consecutive-assistant turn open/close balance). Two back-to-back assistant messages with no intervening user/tool. Upstream suppresses the second assistant's `<|turn>model` OPEN (continue_same_model_turn) but the first already emitted its `<turn|>` CLOSE, leaving an orphaned close -> opens != closes. G9 defers the first message's close so the two share one balanced open/close pair.
_bug: HF google/gemma-4-31B-it discussion #62 (Reithan; Google reproduced + escalated, OPEN). Sibling of G7 turn-marker close logic.
